mapper.update: UPDATE user_coupon uc INNER JOIN coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id SET uc.status = 2 WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 0 AND c.end_time < NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.title, c.amount, c.min_amount AS minAmount, c.start_time AS startTime, c.end_time AS endTime, c.status, COALESCE(c.total_stock, 0) AS totalStock, COALESCE(c.remaining_stock, 0) AS remainingStock, COALESCE(c.receive_count, 0) AS receiveCount, COALESCE(c.per_user_limit, 1) AS perUserLimit, CASE WHEN uc.user_coupon_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS received, uc.user_coupon_id AS userCouponId, uc.status AS userCouponStatus, uc.receive_time AS receiveTime, CASE WHEN c.status = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time AND COALESCE(c.remaining_stock, 0) > 0 AND uc.user_coupon_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS available FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN user_coupon uc ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id AND uc.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.status <> 0 ORDER BY available DESC, c.end_time ASC, c.coupon_id DESC

SELECT coupon_id AS couponId, title, amount, min_amount AS minAmount, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status, COALESCE(total_stock, 0) AS totalStock, COALESCE(remaining_stock, 0) AS remainingStock, COALESCE(receive_count, 0) AS receiveCount, COALESCE(per_user_limit, 1) AS perUserLimit FROM coupon WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET remaining_stock = remaining_stock - 1, receive_count = COALESCE(receive_count, 0) + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW() AND remaining_stock > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon(user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{couponId}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
